title: Implement AccessibilityGuardrails
description: Create guardrail for WCAG 2.1 compliance. Critical: Detect photosensitive seizure risk from flashing content (>3Hz). Also check color contrast, color blindness compatibility, and motion sensitivity.
verifyCommand: npm run build && npm test -- src/core/AccessibilityGuardrails.test.ts
testCases: Flashing background every 2 frames → Should FAIL (seizure risk)
